utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Check full specification: Each required item asks for the coverage type with costs, and the plan provides named policies and monthly costs for each category plus category totals. Health: physical and mental health insurance with costs are present, plus preventive and a total; that satisfies the requirement. Property: home/contents insurance with costs is present (EliteHome Premium Coverage - €95/month) and includes tech add-on and total; requirement satisfied. Travel: travel insurance with costs is present (PrimeTravel Premium Plan - €115/month) with a total; satisfied. Additional_services: enhancement services with costs are provided (Premium Insurance Membership - €50/month) with total; satisfied. Total_budget: complete monthly/annual cost breakdown is provided with monthly, annual, and even savings; satisfied. Therefore, all 5/5 items are included and fully specified according to the format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Extract item names from the final coverage plan and find exact matches in the ground-truth ratings. For each matched item, record its numeric rating. Items present: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health), PrimeCare Premium Plan (mental health), Preventive Care Package, EliteHome Premium Coverage, Technology Protection Add-on (map to Technology Protection), PrimeTravel Premium Plan, Premium Insurance Membership. All of these exist in the ground-truth with explicit ratings.
